title: Clearwater Hot Tub Chemical Starter Kit, Includes Chlorine Granules and Dip Test Strips
features: HOT TUB STARTER BUNDLE: Everything you need to get your hot tub up and running for hygenic and pristine water.
INCLUDES EVERYTHING YOU NEED: Contains chlorine granules (500g), pH Minus (700g), pH Plus (500g), foam remover (500ml), 25 dip test strips, dosing guide.
DISINFECT & BALANCE: Fast-acting chlorine granules kill bacteria, while pH adjusters and test strips help maintain perfect water balance.
EASY TO USE: Comes with simple, step-by-step instructions to help maintain safe, hygienic water with ease.
BISHTA APPROVED MEMBER: Clearwater is a BISHTA approved member and recommended by brands such as Bestway and Lay-Z-Spa for reliable, safe and high-quality water treatment.
description: From the manufacturer Chlorine Granules The rapid dissolving Clearwater Chlorine Granules are an essential sanitiser for hot tubs and an easy way to maintain clean healthy water. 3 in 1 Dip Test Strips Quickly and easily highlight, chlorine, pH and Total Alkalinity levels. There are three separate sections on each strip to indicate each individual level. Foam Remover Prevent and control foaming, regardless of the cause, and help to return the water to a crystal clear appearance. pH Plus and pH Minus Easily adjust the pH levels of your hot tub, by using the increaser or decreaser depending on the results of your dip test strips.
